entry.title: Gold Deep-Sea Fish Oil With Higher Strength Omega-3
entry.s:type: Gold Deep Sea Fish Oil - 60 capsules
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Gold Deep Sea Fish Oil - 60 capsules
Price: 999.00 - 1899.00 (2 variants)

Lead a healthy, happy, and stress-free life knowing that you are continuously shielding your heart, brain, eye, and immunity with our uniquely formulated Omega-3 Gold Capsule.

neuherbs Gold Deep-Sea Fish Oil Omega-3 Capsules is a premium supplement in India designed to improve your health with the power of omega-3 fatty acids. It contains concentrated and highly potent Omega-3 fatty acids, Boswellia extract, curcuminoids, and Vitamins D3 and E. Each daily serving (2 capsules) delivers an impressive 1800mg of omega-3, including 1080mg of EPA and 720mg of DHA.

6X Omega-3

Muscle Recovery & Performance

Joint Support

Enhanced Absorption

Molecullarly Distilled

Trusted by 3 million

Why Should You Choose neuherbs’ Omega 3 Gold Fish Oil Capsule?

The Omega-3 fish oil gold is procured from the best quality deep-sea fish, anchovies, and sardines. We use an advanced molecular distillation process that separates, purifies, and concentrates the fish oil at low temperature to remove any heavy metal toxicity, organic contaminants, and other health-damaging ingredients. This advanced molecular distillation removes mercury, copper, and cadmium without losing the oil’s potency and nutrient efficiency.

The EPA and DHA found in Omega 3 Fatty Acids help boost good cholesterol levels and lower bad cholesterol, promoting overall heart health. They can also help reduce triglycerides, improving liver function and toxin removal process. Fatty acid DHA is known for its ability to enhance cognitive health and memory and navigate age-related brain issues like Alzheimer’s and dementia. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory properties help reduce muscle inflammation caused by injury, improve flexibility, and maintain joint health.

The all-new, unique, lemon-flavoured formula from neuherbs also offers the goodness of Vitamin E and Vitamin D3. They together help manage bone health as you age and protect your skin and hair from oxidative stress.

Omega Gold Capsule Benefits


  • Supports Cardiovascular Health: Regular intake promotes healthy cholesterol levels and blood pressure, contributing to overall heart wellness.
  • Improves Joint Flexibility: Infused with Boswellia extract. This supplement aids in reducing inflammation and alleviating joint stiffness, perfect for athletes, sportspersons, and bodybuilders.
  • Boosts Brain Function: Rich in DHA, these capsules support cognitive health, enhancing memory and focus.
  • Strengthens Immune System: The antioxidant properties of omega-3s help combat oxidative stress, promoting a strong immune response to various illnesses.
  • Improves Muscle Recovery: Ideal for post-workout recovery, our omega 3 gold fish oil tablets and capsules with added Vitamin D3 assist in muscle strength and performance optimisation.
  • Natural Lemon Essence: The natural flavour of lemon minimises fishy burps and unpleasant aftertaste commonly associated with other brands’ Omega 3 gold tablets.


Omega 3 Gold capsule benefits don’t end here. The presence of curcuminoids further makes the formula more bioavailable and result-driven.

Quality Trusted by Over 3 Million Consumers in India

At neuherbs, we prioritise quality above all. Our Omega 3 gold fish oils undergo rigorous third-party testing to ensure it is free from heavy metals and contaminants. Furthermore, each batch is evaluated based on ten quality control checks so that you get the best of both worlds – traditional Ayurveda and western science. We adhere to sustainable harvesting practices, ensuring that our fish oil is not only effective but also environmentally friendly.

Dosage and Packaging

neuherbs' omega 3 gold capsules are available in convenient packs of 60 softgels. Simply take one capsule twice daily with meals for optimal results. As a leader in health and wellness supplements in India, neuherbs is committed to providing natural solutions to improve your well-being without side effects or dependency.

entry.title: Deep Sea Cod Liver Oil Capsules for Heart & Brain
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Omega
Price: 299.00

Are you looking for a natural alternative to fish oil supplements to boost your heart and brain health? Cod liver oil capsules are an excellent choice. neuherbs Deep Sea Cod Liver Oil Capsules 600 mg offer a potent blend of Omega-3 fatty acids (180mg), Vitamin D3, and Vitamin E in one convenient soft gel. Obtained from the depths of the Atlantic and Pacific oceans, our cod liver oil is a rich source of essential nutrients that support overall well-being.


Cod fish is a time-tested source of Omega-3s, known for their numerous health benefits. These fish get their Omega-3s by absorbing the microalgae after consuming phytoplanktons. Each capsule contains high levels of EPA and DHA, vital for maintaining a healthy heart and sharp mind. Cod liver oil also contains vitamins A and D and remarkable anti-inflammatory properties. So, with neuherbs, you not only get the benefits of Omega-3 fatty acids, but also 100% RDA of Vitamin A, D, and E.


What’s more? Our lemon-flavoured capsules eliminate the unpleasant aftertaste and fishy burps commonly associated with cod liver oil.


Cod Liver Oil Capsules Benefits


neuherbs Deep Sea Cod Liver Oil Capsules offer a range of health benefits:


  • Keeps Your Heart Healthy: Omega-3 fatty acids help maintain healthy cholesterol levels and blood pressure, promoting cardiovascular wellness.
  • Improves Your Brain Function: DHA is crucial for cognitive function, memory, and focus, supporting a sharp and healthy mind.
  • Boosts Your Immunity: Vitamin D3 and anti-inflammatory drugs help modulate the immune system and keep infections at bay.
  • Maintains Healthy Bones: Vitamin D3 is essential for calcium absorption and bone health, ensuring you have stronger bones, cartilage, and muscles.
  • Offers Antioxidant Support: Vitamin E acts as a powerful antioxidant, protecting cells from oxidative damage. This helps improve gut, skin, and hair health.
  • Nourishes Skin: The anti-inflammatory properties and antioxidants together help boost skin cell production, protect them from stress and inflammation, and reduce the signs of ageing.


Cod Liver Oil Benefits for Female


Omega-3 fatty acids, particularly DHA, are essential during pregnancy for fetal brain development. It can potentially improve your unborn baby’s brain function and retina development. By taking the best cod liver oil for adults, you can also reduce the risks of preterm delivery.


neuherbs Quality Check


neuherbs delivers high-quality health supplements with scientifically tested formulations. Our Deep Sea Cod Liver Oil undergoes molecular distillation and third-party testing for purity, efficiency, and safety. Free from preservatives, artificial colours, flavours, and gluten, they are the best cod liver oil capsules in India.


Dosage and Packaging


neuherbs Deep Sea Cod Liver Oil Capsules Omega 3 are available in bottles of 100 capsules. For best results, take one capsule twice daily with a meal.


Consult with a healthcare professional to learn more about your specific health needs and the benefits of Omega-3 fatty acids, Vitamin D3, and Vitamin E.

entry.title: True Vitamin Wellness Combo for Women & Adults 40+
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: adult and women combo
Price: 798.00

Nutritional needs are bound to change for individuals at different stages of their lives. A man will have different needs from a woman, a 20 year old will have different nutritional needs from a 40 year old. While some nutritions are consistently required in humans, multivitamins need to cater to the specific needs of people. To target this very need, neuherbs bring to you our True Multivitamin Adults 40+ and True vitamin Women combo —- to help you address daily nutritional gaps at different stages of life. True Vitamin Women multivitamin tablets for women help with reproductive health, their hair, skin or bone health and helps them maintain high energy levels throughout their day. On the other hand, multivitamins for adults above 40 are formulated using natural herbs & other ingredients rich in vitamins, minerals, along with probiotics & digestive enzymes to support bone health, digestion and energy metabolism within the body. Both of these supplement show our wide variety of products and dedication in bringing wellness to you, while also proving to be a valuable addition to your daily balanced diets.

entry.title: Plant-Based True Vitamin B12 Tablets For Energy & Brain
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True B12 Vitamin
Price: 275.00 - 549.00 (2 variants)

Vitamin B12 deficiency can lead to tiredness, muscle soreness, muscle cramps, uninvited fatigue, depression, and even mood swings. Vitamin B12 supplements are best for vegans & vegetarians that may promote better circulation, improve concentration and memory, keep the mind calm, promote nerve health, reduce tiredness, improve energy levels, and boost metabolic processes. It's the best Vitamin B12 supplement which consists of natural Vitamin B12 derived from spirulina to help you fulfill your daily Vitamin B12 needs. True B12 Vitamin tablet for men and women with Myo-Inositol which help promote better absorption that help maintain optimal brain functioning, reduce stress & anxiety and is a good mood enhancer. In addition, neuherbs True B12 Vitamin also contains folic acid and the goodness of Punarnava. Punarnava is best known for its rejuvenating properties that help the body recover oxidative stress and rejuvenate the body from within.

entry.title: True Magnesium Tablets - Relax Muscles & Mind, Support Bones
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True Magnesium
Price: 399.00 - 699.00 (2 variants)

Magnesium is essential for proper heart function, energy production, hormonal balance, and muscle function. It is essentially known as the “Miracle Mineral” because of its versatile benefits. It also helps our body absorb Vitamin D3 better, promotes healthy nervous function, improves bone health, calms the mind, regulates insulin production, and keeps the body energized throughout the day. neuherbs True Magnesium is a high strength formula that contains 1600 mg of magnesium, that is uniquely paired with Zinc, Vitamin C, antioxidants like Blueberry, and Bilberry for maximum benefits. True Magnesium is created to fulfil your body’s daily magnesium needs. True Magnesium supplement contains 353mg of elemental Magnesium Bisglycinate in a more bioavailable form which is gentle on stomach. It effectively contributes to keeping the muscle relaxed, helps improve energy levels, promote sound sleep, calms the mind, fights free-radical damage, improves immunity & promote better muscle recovery.

entry.title: True Vitamin Women: Multivitamin Tablets For Women
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True Vitamin Women
Price: 349.00 - 698.00 (2 variants)

Created explicitly for adult women to help manage their daily nutritional needs. neuherbs True Vitamin Women multivitamin tablets contains 34 ingredients including four essential blends that provide comprehensive wellness support. The multivitamin tablets offer 100% RDA of essential vitamins with vital minerals, amino acids, and plant-based vitamin D3, which help women nourish and improve their bones, heart, immunity, and hair- skin effectively. These multivitamin tablets for women help manage hormonal balance, elevated mood and poor reproductive health. The amino acids with vitamin b complex help with fatigue and boost energy levels required to carry out daily tasks effectively.

entry.title: True Multivitamin Adult 40+ Tablets - Immunity, Energy, Digestion
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True Vitamin Adult
Price: 449.00 - 898.00 (2 variants)

Scientifically designed for men and women above 40 years of age, neuherbs True Multivitamin Adults 40+ tablet is made with 13 vitamins, 9 minerals and unique herbal blend essential for the body’s optimal functioning that naturally starts declining after 40. True multivitamin tablets offer great digestive benefits due to the presence of digestive enzymes & probiotics content in it, helping you in smooth digestion, better nutrient absorption and happy mood as well. A natural blend of ginseng and L lysine may improve metabolism and overall energy levels considerably. Its herbal blend containing ayurvedic herbs like Brahmi and Bhringraj helps calm the mind, improve focus & mental clarity. neuherbs True Multivitamin Adults 40+ is further enriched with plant-based Vitamin D3 to maintain healthy bones & maximize well-being.

entry.title: Gym Shaker Bottle For Protein Shakes With Whisk Ball
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Gym Shaker Bottle
Price: 179.00

Enjoy the powerful, tasty, and highly nutritious beverage-based supplements from neuherbs in our all-new and cool gym shaker bottle. Take your fitness journey to new heights with our stylish bottle that is practical, leak-proof, and adds a touch of style to your daily routine.

Designed for athletes, runners, bodybuilders, hikers, trekkers, and even office goers, the sturdy protein shaker bottle includes a 100% leak-proof cap with a carrying loop and a premium whisk mixer ball for easy mixability. It's ideal for preparing and carrying weight loss smoothies, protein shakes, and workout supplements.

Made from high-quality material, this special workout accessory is durable, BPA-free, easy to clean, and has a 400ml capacity. The leak-proof lid allows you to confidently shake and carry your favorite beverage anywhere, anytime, without worrying about making a mess. Plus, the whisk ball ensures a smooth and clump-free beverage, blending all the ingredients perfectly in minutes.

  • How easily can I clean it?

    The bottle can be cleaned quite easily and quickly. Its round and broad mouth and base ensure easy cleaning with a brush.

  • In how many colours is it available?

    Currently, it is available in Black and White colour only.

  • Is this Gym Shaker Bottle BPA-free?

    Yes. This handy Protein Shaker Bottle is made with high-quality BPA-free material for safe consumption.

  • Is it easy to carry?

    Yes, it is easy to carry. The bottle’s compact 400 ml capacity makes it an ideal hydrating and nourishing partner for yoga, gym sessions, morning walks, cycling trips, and beyond.

  • Can I use it for outdoor and adventurous sports?

    Yes. IT IS 100% LEAK PROOF.

    You can use it for adventurous sports like trekking, running, hiking, cycling, and mountain climbing without worrying about spillages or leaks.

  • Can I use it to mix neuherbs powder-based supplements?

    Yes, you can use it for protein shakes, workout supplements, neuherbs effervescent, and for carrying water too.

  • Does it have an in-built blender?

    Yes. A whisk-ball or blender is built inside the cap, providing a consistent, smooth, and lump-free blend.

neuherbs True Vitamin and Pure Himalayan Men's Wellness Combo offers a comprehensive solution for men seeking to optimize their health and well-being. True Vitamin provides a potent blend of essential vitamins and minerals, supporting overall vitality and energy levels. Combined with the Pure Himalayan Shilajit for men, this combo delivers targeted nutrients that address specific health concerns commonly faced by men, such as prostate health, testosterone levels, and stress management. By nourishing your body with essential nutrients and addressing unique male health needs, this combo empowers you to live a healthier, more fulfilling life.

Price: 1298.00

neuherbs Gut-Heart Health Combo offers a comprehensive approach to manage gut health & heart health. The Omega 3 Fish Oil provides essential omega 3 fatty acids that support heart health, reduce inflammation, and promote healthy heart, muscle function alongside promotes brain & bone health. Probiotics and prebiotics work together to nourish beneficial gut bacteria, improving digestion, immune function, and overall well-being. This blend helps maintain a healthy gut microbiome, which is crucial for optimal health and healthy mood. By nourishing your body from within, this combo promotes a healthy heart, gut, brain, bone, muscles  & skin.

neuherbs Deep-Sea Fish Oil and True Vitamin Strength Booster Combo offers a powerful blend of essential nutrients to support your overall health and vitality. The deep-sea fish oil provides a rich source of omega-3 fatty acids, known for their anti-inflammatory properties and benefits for heart health, brain function, and joint health. entry.title: Neuherbs True Vitamin Daily Tablets
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Multivitamin Tablets
Price: 399.00 - 798.00 (2 variants)

Does the diet you are taking are full of vitamins, minerals, healthy fats & antioxidants? And if yes, does it get properly absorbed by your body? Do you still feel lethargic after eating healthy food? The answer to all these questions is fulfilment of daily nutritional needs with appropriate absorption. And it is not an easy task. But including a multivitamin into the daily diet can help. Neuherbs True Vitamin Daily multivitamin tablet is formulated with 22 key ingredients which are validated by science to provide various health benefits. Neuherbs Multivitamin is a solution for today’s unhealthy habits of binging on fast food that only offers empty calories & zero nutrition. We designed this formula of Multivitamin (Vitamin A, E, C, D & B complex) Multimineral (Zinc, Magnesium, Copper, Selenium,) along with ginseng and antioxidant from Grape Seed extract (95% Proanthocyanins) to help you provide overall strength, stamina, enhanced immunity, support heart, brain health and improve quality of life.

entry.title: Deep Sea Fish Oil Capsules - 2500 mg Omega 3 (Lemon Flavored)
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Fish Oil
Price: 699.00 - 1799.00 (3 variants)

Neuherbs Deep Sea Fish Oil – Omega-3 Capsules for Daily Wellness

Looking for the best fish oil capsules in India? neuherbs deep sea fish oil offers a triple-strength formula designed to support your overall health. These omega-3 fish oil capsules are lemon-flavoured to eliminate fishy burps, making them the perfect fish oil supplement for men and women alike.

Why Choose Neuherbs Fish Oil Capsules?

Neuherbs brings you premium-quality fish oil capsules sourced from small deep-sea fish like sardines and anchovies. Rich in EPA and DHA, these omega-3 fish oil capsules deliver 2500 mg of pure fish oil per serving and are added with Vitamins E and D3.

  • Heart Health: Promotes healthy cholesterol level and supports cardiac function.
  • Brain Function: Improves memory, focus, & helps manage stress.
  • Skin & Hair: Among the best fish oil capsules for hair growth and glowing skin.
  • Weight Management: Ideal fish oil capsules for weight loss and metabolism support.
  • Joint & Bone Strength: Helps reduce inflammation and aids in muscle recovery.


Product Features

  • Triple-Strength Omega-3 Fish Oil Capsuless (2500 mg per serving, 2 capsules)
  • 1486 mg of Omega-3s: 892 mg EPA + 594 mg DHA
  • Lemon-flavoured softgels – no fishy burps and aftertaste
  • Fortified with Vitamin D3 and E
  • Available size includes fish oil 60 capsules and fish oil 200 capsules
  • Suitable for all: fish oil capsules for women improve hormone health and promote healthy pregnancy and fish oil capsules for men aid in post-workout muscle recovery, and brain and vision health.


Best-Rated Fish Oil Supplements with Quality You Can Trust

Our original fish oil capsules undergo 10 quality checks, including molecular distillation and third-party testing to remove heavy metals like mercury, lead, and arsenic. Whether you're buying your first pack or switching to a cleaner brand, this is the best omega-3 fish oil capsule, acclaimed for purity, potency, and effectiveness.

Affordable Fish Oil Capsules Price in India

With neuherbs, you don’t just get the best omega-3 capsules, you get premium quality at a great value. Whether you are comparing fish oil capsules price or omega-3 capsules price, our range delivers unmatched benefits for the price.

Who Should Use This?

  • Anyone looking for omega-3 fish oil capsules for daily heart and brain health
  • People seeking fish oil capsules for skin ageing or fish oil capsules for hair growth
  • Fitness enthusiasts using fish oil capsules for weight loss and recovery
  • Men and women looking to fill their omega-3 nutritional gap naturally
